payload:
# Office of Accountability — Implementation Prompt

## Objective

Build a civic knowledge platform for Argentine politics as an interactive graph explorer. The platform links politicians, votes, legislation, donors, promises, and user-contributed research into a single explorable, queryable system powered by Neo4j and deployed on Cloudflare Workers via Vinext.

## Stack

- **Frontend + API + SSR:** Vinext (App Router, Server Components, Route Handlers) → Cloudflare Workers
- **Database:** Ne... [truncated, 7860 chars total]

Step 1.1: Create engine dashboard page at src/app/caso/[slug]/motor/page.tsx — server component importing EngineDashboard client component, passing casoSlug param. Use same layout patterns as other caso subpages.
Step 1.1: Created motor/page.tsx server component + EngineDashboard.tsx stub. Follows simulacion pattern. Typecheck clean. Commit 076cf3b.
Step 1.1: motor/page.tsx + EngineDashboard stub. Typecheck clean. Pattern matches simulacion/page.tsx exactly. No issues.
Step 1.1 review passed. 5 sub-tasks remain in Step 1 (1.2-1.6). Next: task engine-ui:dashboard-component — build full EngineDashboard client component with tab navigation and engine state fetching.

Step 1.2: Build full EngineDashboard.tsx client component with 4 tabs (Pipeline, Proposals, Audit, Snapshots), engine state fetching, and minimal stubs for sub-components. Target: webapp/src/components/engine/EngineDashboard.tsx. Task: task-1774121735-5197. See scratchpad for detailed builder context.

Step 1.2 complete: EngineDashboard.tsx full client component with 4 tabs (Pipeline/Proposals/Audit/Snapshots), engine state fetching, status display, and 4 sub-component stubs. Commit bbc9830. Typecheck clean.
Step 1.2 EngineDashboard: 4 tabs, state fetch, status display, 4 stubs. Typecheck clean. No issues.
Step 1.2 review passed. 4 sub-tasks remain (1.3-1.6): PipelineStatus, ProposalReview, AuditLog, SnapshotManager. Builder should implement these — stubs already exist.
Step 1.3: Implement PipelineStatus.tsx — pipeline state display with stage progress, run/stop controls, gate indicator. Builder context in scratchpad.

Step 1.3 PipelineStatus.tsx: full component with state fetch, status display (5-state color coding), Run Pipeline button, gate pending banner, error detail, pipeline details panel. Added pipelineId prop, updated parent. Typecheck clean. Commit b0c6fd8.
Step 1.3 PipelineStatus.tsx: all requirements met, typecheck clean, no blocking issues. 3 tasks remain (ProposalReview, AuditLog, SnapshotManager).
Step 1.3 PipelineStatus review passed. 3 ready tasks remain: ProposalReview, AuditLog, SnapshotManager. Builder picks up next sub-task.
Step 1.4: Replace ProposalReview.tsx stub with full component — pending proposals list with batch approve/reject, status filters, confidence display, expandable detail rows

Step 1.4: ProposalReview.tsx implemented — proposals fetch, status filters (all/pending/approved/rejected), batch select+approve/reject, expandable detail rows with full reasoning+payload, confidence color coding, typecheck clean

Step 1.4 ProposalReview: typecheck clean, all requirements met — proposals fetch, status filters with counts, batch select+approve/reject, expandable detail with reasoning+payload, confidence colors, status badges, empty/loading/error states
Step 1.4 ProposalReview review passed + closed. 2 ready tasks remain: AuditLog (1.5) and SnapshotManager (1.6). Builder picks up next.
Step 1.5: AuditLog component — replace stub with full audit trail display, hash chain validation, expandable entries, action badges

AuditLog component: audit trail display with hash chain validation (green/red banner), action badges (8 types + fallback), expandable detail rows with full hash/prev_hash, relative timestamps, chain break highlighting. Typecheck clean.

AuditLog: typecheck clean, all requirements met (hash chain validation, 8 action badges + fallback, expandable detail, relative timestamps, chain break highlighting, empty/loading/error states). No blocking issues.
AuditLog (1.5) review passed and task closed. 1 ready task remains: SnapshotManager (1.6) — last sub-component in Step 1.
Step 1.6: Replace SnapshotManager.tsx stub with full snapshot list/create/delete UI. Last sub-component in Step 1.
Step 1.6: SnapshotManager implemented — list/create/delete snapshots with confirmation, dark theme, typed props. Typecheck clean. Last sub-component of Step 1 complete.
Step 1.6 SnapshotManager: typecheck clean, all requirements met. Step 1 fully complete — all 6 sub-tasks done and reviewed. Ready for Step 2.
Step 1 (Engine Dashboard Page + Layout) fully complete — all 6 sub-tasks built and reviewed. Advancing to Step 2 (Gate Approval UI).
Step 2 started — Gate Approval UI. First task: create GateApproval.tsx component (task-1774123557-ef70). Builder context in scratchpad Step 2.1.
GateApproval.tsx created (commit b346ae2). Approve/reject with 2-step reject confirmation, loading/error/success states, onAction callback. Typecheck clean.

GateApproval step 2.1: typecheck clean, all requirements met (approve/reject POST, 2-step reject confirmation, loading/error/success states, onAction callback, URL-encoded stageId). No blocking issues.
Step 2.1 GateApproval review passed. 1 sub-task remains: 2.2 wire GateApproval into PipelineStatus. Builder context written to scratchpad.
Step 2.2: Wire GateApproval into PipelineStatus gate pending banner (task-1774123562-8e69). Builder context in scratchpad.

Step 2.2: Wired GateApproval into PipelineStatus gate pending banner. Replaced static yellow banner with inline GateApproval component (approve/reject + confirmation). onAction→fetchState for auto-refresh. Typecheck clean. Commit 83d78e1.

M10 Frontend complete. All engine dashboard components implemented: EngineDashboard (5 tabs), PipelineStatus+GateApproval, ProposalReview, AuditLog, SnapshotManager, OrchestratorPanel+TaskQueue. Typecheck clean, production build passes, no orphaned TODOs.

## Reason
completed

## Status
All tasks completed successfully.

## Summary
- Iterations: 32
- Duration: 45m 44s
- Exit code: 0
